arts.ttl: The Long Ball Futebol Podcast: Casa Pia beat Benfica as Sporting go 6 points clear
arts.sum: This week the Long Ball Futebol Podcast welcomes guest Andrew Batista to discuss Jornada 19 of the Primeira Liga season. Casa Pia beat Benfica for the first time since the 1930s, Sporting go six points clear at the top, Porto appoint a new manager, plus much more! To listen to the podcast click on the play button below. You can contact the show on X @LongBallFutebol. Related: Galeno fails to convert two penalties as Porto held to a 1-1 draw against Santa Clara Related: Estoril march on as João Carvalho special sinks Vitória Related: Sporting CP beat Nacional 2-0 to go six points clear in the Primeira Liga Related: Casa Pia stun Benfica 3-1 in Rio Maior

arts.ttl: Champions League | Juventus v Benfica: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare to host Benfica in their final Champions League group stage match, manager Thiago Motta faces a selection headache in the striker position. Recent loan signing Randal Kolo Muani, who made an immediate impact in Serie A against Napoli, is ineligible for European competition during the league phase. The post Champions League | Juventus v Benfica: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: Juventus haven’t completely given up for Jean-Clair Todibo and, while they are keen on adding another center-back, they’ll do it only if they find the right reinforcement. arts.ttl: OM Eyes Juventus Midfielder Fagioli for Winter Mercato Strengthening
Andrea Cambiaso to Man City: How close are Pep Guardiola's side to signing Juventus full-back?
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso appears to emerge as a top target for Man City, but they may have to wait until the summer to secure his services.
